title: ICanGamez Magical Accessories
description: This adds a couple new accessories to minecraft!
body:
This datapack adds 10 new special passive accessories that make minecraft more rpg like or more tactical like.
The items it adds are:
Boots of Swiftness,
Ring of Invisibility,
Staff of Fire,
Bag of Holding,
Amulet of Life Preservation,
Lunar Compass,
Pheonix Feather,
Aqua Whisper Pendent,
Stormcaller Gloves,
Sparkling Dust Pouch.



<details>
<summary>How does it work?</summary>

This works by crouching to use the items ability.
Some items will effect other mobs.
Most items only effect the user.
Some items will give full passive abilities when a certain thing is achieved.

</details>

Made By: ICanGamez
